instruction:
The extension is available in the extension/add-on store of the respective browser: 
* [Chrome](https://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/grammarly-for-chrome/kbfnbcaeplbcioakkpcpgfkobkghlhen?hl=en) 
* [Firefox](https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/grammarly-1/)
* [Edge](https://microsoftedge.microsoft.com/addons/detail/grammarly-ai-writing-and/cnlefmmeadmemmdciolhbnfeacpdfbkd)
* [Safari](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/grammarly-for-safari/id1462114288)

**Browser Extension vulnerabilities will not be distinguished. For example, if a vulnerability exists in the Chrome and Safari extensions, we will consider it the same vulnerability and will only award one bounty.**

[Grammarly for Android](https://www.grammarly.com/mobile/android).

Vulnerabilities with PoC may qualify for additional bounty via [Google Play Security Rewards Program](https://hackerone.com/googleplay). See [Vulnerability Criteria](https://hackerone.com/googleplay) for details.

- `send.grammarly.com`
- `calendar.grammarly.com`
- `support.grammarly.com`
- `status.grammarly.com`
- `brand.grammarly.com`
- `partners.grammarly.com`
- `events.grammarly.com`
- `go.grammarly.com`

Any submissions on these domains and their subdomains are out of scope for bounty.
The first hacker who reports the `$FLAG` saved in the document (`document_id: 1198436185`) of the user `h1_ctf@grammarly.com` (`user_id: 1411519194`) will be awarded a **$100K bounty**.
app.grammarly.com is Grammarly’s web application, enabling users to create, edit, and manage documents while accessing the full suite of Grammarly features through the online editor.

Superhuman Go is a proactive AI assistant that integrates with 100+ apps to coordinate agents and provide context-aware help across your workflow. It works in every tab where you work.
[Superhuman Go - AI Assistant](https://superhuman.com/products/go-ai-assistant)
Only domains that originate through superhuman.com are accepted here. If we determine the domain is generated through superhuman mail or its infra, we will mark this as out of scope.

Any assets related to Superhuman Mail are out of scope and go through VDP via `security@superhuman.com`
  * mail.superhuman.com
  * accounts.superhuman.com
  * r.superhuman.com
  * media.superhuman.com 
  * assets.mail.superhuman.com
  * emojis.superhuman.com 
  * help.superhuman.com
  * blog.superhuman.com
  * media.superhuman.com
  * accounts.superhuman.com
  * preferences.superhuman.com
  * email.superhuman.com
  * join.superhuman.com
  * https://superhuman.com/pricing
  * https://superhuman.com/products/mail/*

And any other assets not mentioned here but originating from the Superhuman Mail product/website.
